post.content: Recently had uber onsite interview and got rejected even after passing all test cases\nUsed approach1 as in Editorial (Bus Routes) feedback was it was not optimal implementation\n
Looks like this is the question - https://leetcode.com/problems/bus-routes/description/\nAnd the editorial link - https://leetcode.com/problems/bus-routes/editorial/
Which role? What is your YOE?
Used approach1 as in Editorial (Bus Routes) => what is this can you explain in details?
next time download Interview Monkey AI just in case they ask something ridiculous\n\n
